_comment: Address -> MSVC mangled name map for renaming dtk's fn_<addr> symbols in target .obj files. Consumed by scripts/obj_target_symbol_renamer.py and wired in via configure.py's custom_build_steps. Most 0x entries are auto-generated by `tools/fingerprint_match.py gen_target_map` (bindiff conf>=0.95, similarity>=0.96, cross-TU callees included). Hand-verified entries are preserved on collision (manual wins).
_denylist_comment: Addresses that gen_target_map must never auto-emit (hand-flagged bad bindiff guesses / fingerprint collisions). 0x82759310 was a known DrawBounds collision (similarity 0.91).
